items.headline: CME Group Adds Four E-mini Futures for Broad Market Exposure
items.summary: CME expands its equity index futures lineup with four new E-mini contracts, targeting demand for broad-market exposure and risk management.
items.why_it_matters: News may increase risk, valuation pressure, or negative sentiment.

items.headline: SpaceX Stock Options Coming Soon
items.summary: Thursday was the IPO. Friday was SpaceX's stock-market debut. Next week, investors will have SpaceX stock options. Cboe Global Markets said options tied to SpaceX stock will arrive on Tuesday. That isn't particularly surprising.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Cboe Will List SpaceX Options As Soon as Tuesday
items.summary: Traders will soon be able to pounce on options contracts tied to SpaceX.  Cboe Global Markets said that it expects to list options tied to SpaceX as soon as Tuesday, pending some industry checks, including certification from the OCC, or Options Clearing Corporation.  "It's exciting," said Rob Hocking, Cboe's global head of derivatives.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Tradr ETFs Set for Liftoff Alongside SpaceX IPO
items.summary: Tradr ETFs, a provider of ETFs designed for sophisticated investors and professional traders, today announced that it expects to launch two leveraged single-stock ETFs tied to SpaceX on Monday, June 15, following the company's highly anticipated public market debut.  The new Cboe-listed funds are designed to provide traders with amplified exposure to daily moves in SpaceX stock, offering both bullish and bearish investors a targeted strategy to express their views on one of the world's most closely watched and highly anticipated public companies of all time.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Assessing Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Valuation After Recent Pullback And Ongoing Earnings Growth Expectations
items.summary: Short term moves and recent performance context Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) climbed 3.6% in the latest session, building on a 5.6% gain over the past week, even as the stock is down about 14.1% over the past month. Despite the recent pullback that left the 1 month share price return down 14.1%, Cboe Global Markets still has positive momentum, with the year to date share price return at 21.35% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 36.5%.
